name: astralform-plugins
description: Astralform plugins for Claude Code - manage AI agent projects and development tooling

plugins.name: astralform
plugins.description: Manage Astralform AI agent projects directly from Claude Code - create projects, manage API keys, configure LLMs, and integrate the iOS SDK

plugins.name: lint
plugins.description: Data-driven lint plugin with 9 language support, auto-fix integration, and blocking behavior for missing tools

plugins.name: memory
plugins.description: Automatic persistent memory for Claude Code - captures learnings across sessions with progressive disclosure and markdown-first storage

plugins.name: xcode
plugins.description: Swift Package Manager build/test commands and Xcode project utilities including project renaming

plugins.name: ios-developer
plugins.description: Comprehensive iOS development expertise with Swift 6+ concurrency, SwiftUI animations, and Swift Evolution tracking
